# ai-summary

> CLI tool that compresses web content for AI coding agents, reducing token consumption by 60-98%.

ai-summary is designed to help AI agents (like Claude Code, Cursor, or GPT-4) efficiently consume web content by stripping noise and summarizing key information. It supports multiple LLM and search backends for maximum flexibility.

## Documentation
- [Full Documentation](https://ai-summary.agent-tools.org/llms-full.txt): Complete guide to installation, all subcommands, configuration, hooks, and examples.
- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/agent-tools-org/ai-summary): Access the source code, report issues, and contribute to the project.
- [Website](https://ai-summary.agent-tools.org): Official project home page.
